a-silent-voice.title: A Silent Voice
a-silent-voice.description: A Silent Voice is a Japanese animated drama based on the manga of the same name by Yoshitoki Ōima. The story follows a young boy named Shoya Ishida, who bullies a deaf girl named Shoko Nishimiya during elementary school. As a result, Shoko transfers to another school, and Shoya becomes ostracized and bullied by his classmates. Years later, Shoya, now a high school student, is filled with guilt and seeks redemption by trying to make amends with Shoko. The film delves into themes of bullying, disability, forgiveness, and the quest for personal redemption.

attack-on-titan.title: Attack On Titan
attack-on-titan.description: Attack on Titan is set in a world where humanity lives within massive walls to protect itself from Titans, giant humanoid creatures that devour humans. The story follows Eren Yeager, who vows to eradicate the Titans after they destroy his hometown and kill his mother. Alongside his friends Mikasa Ackerman and Armin Arlert, Eren joins the Survey Corps, a military group that ventures beyond the walls. As the series unfolds, it reveals a complex web of conspiracies, including the origins of the Titans, Eren’s ability to transform into one, and a centuries-old conflict between the Eldians and Marleyans. The narrative evolves from survival horror to a deep exploration of war, morality, and freedom, culminating in Eren’s controversial plan to reshape the world.

black-clover.title: Black Clover
black-clover.description: Asta and Yuno were abandoned together at the same church and have been inseparable since. As children, they promised that they would compete against each other to see who would become the next Emperor Magus.

classroom-of-the-elite.title: Classroom of The Elite
classroom-of-the-elite.description: "Classroom of the Elite" is set in the prestigious Tokyo Metropolitan Advanced Nurturing High School, which boasts a 100% employment and college entry rate for its students. The story follows Kiyotaka Ayanokoji, a seemingly average student who prefers to keep a low profile. The school separates students into four classes, A to D, based on merit, and provides them with luxurious facilities and a monthly allowance. However, students in lower-ranked classes face tougher conditions and fewer privileges.

death-note.title: Death Note
death-note.description: An intelligent high school student goes on a secret crusade to eliminate criminals from the world after discovering a notebook capable of killing anyone whose name is written into it.

demon-slayer.title: Demon Slayer
demon-slayer.description: A family is attacked by demons and only two members survive - Tanjiro and his sister Nezuko, who is turning into a demon slowly. Tanjiro sets out to become a demon slayer to avenge his family and cure his sister.

fullmetal-alchemist-brotherhood.title: Fullmetal Alchemist Brotherhood
fullmetal-alchemist-brotherhood.description: "Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood" is a Japanese anime series that closely follows the original manga by Hiromu Arakawa. It is set in a world where alchemy is a widely practiced science and follows the journey of two brothers, Edward and Alphonse Elric. After a failed alchemical experiment to bring their mother back to life, Edward loses his left leg and right arm, while Alphonse loses his entire body, his soul being bound to a suit of armor. To restore their bodies, they seek the Philosopher's Stone, a powerful alchemical artifact.

i-want-to-eat-your-pancreas.title: I Want To Eat Your Pancreas
i-want-to-eat-your-pancreas.description: "I Want to Eat Your Pancreas" is a Japanese animated film based on the novel of the same name by Yoru Sumino. The story follows an introverted high school boy who discovers the diary of his classmate, Sakura Yamauchi, and learns that she is suffering from a terminal pancreatic illness. Despite their contrasting personalities—Sakura being cheerful and outgoing, while the protagonist is reserved and indifferent—they form an unlikely friendship. As they spend more time together, they grow closer, and the protagonist learns to embrace life and human connections.

jujutsu-kaisen-0.title: Jujutsu Kaisen 0
jujutsu-kaisen-0.description: Yuta Okkotsu, a high schooler who gains control of an extremely powerful Cursed Spirit and gets enrolled in the Tokyo Prefectural Jujutsu High School by Jujutsu Sorcerers to help him control his power and keep an eye on him.

kaiju-no-8.title: Kaiju No 8
kaiju-no-8.description: Kafka Hibino, a 32-year-old man who cleans up after kaiju battles, gets infected by a small kaiju and gains the ability to transform into one.

my-hero-academia.title: My Hero Academia
my-hero-academia.description: My Hero Academia is set in a world where nearly everyone has superpowers, called "Quirks," and being a professional hero is a celebrated career. Izuku Midoriya, a Quirkless teen, inherits the powers of the world’s greatest hero, All Might, after showing selfless courage. Enrolling at U.A. High School, a prestigious academy for aspiring heroes, Midoriya trains to master his new Quirk, One For All, alongside a diverse group of classmates in Class 1-A. As they face villain attacks, personal struggles, and intense training, the series explores themes of heroism, teamwork, and perseverance. The story escalates with the rise of the League of Villains, led by Tomura Shigaraki, and a looming threat tied to the origins of Quirks, pushing Midoriya and his friends to their limits.

naruto-shippuden.title: Naruto Shippuden
naruto-shippuden.description: "Naruto Shippuden" is the sequel to the original "Naruto" anime series, continuing the story of Naruto Uzumaki, a young ninja with a dream of becoming the strongest ninja and the leader of his village, the Hokage. The series picks up after a two-and-a-half-year time skip, with Naruto returning to his village, Konohagakure, after intensive training with his mentor, Jiraiya. Naruto and his friends face new challenges and threats, including the criminal organization Akatsuki, which aims to capture the powerful Tailed Beasts, including the one sealed within Naruto. The series delves deeper into the pasts and motivations of its characters, exploring themes of friendship, perseverance, and redemption.

ninja-kamui.title: Ninja Kamui
ninja-kamui.description: The story revolves around Joe Higan, a former ninja who has left his violent past behind and settled into a peaceful life in rural America. However, when his past catches up with him and his family is brutally murdered by his old clan, Joe is forced to take up his former identity as Kamui. Seeking revenge and justice, Kamui re-enters the shadowy world of ninjas, assassins, and mercenaries.

one-piece.title: One piece
one-piece.description: Monkey D. Luffy refuses to let anyone or anything stand in the way of his quest to become the king of all pirates. With a course charted for the treacherous waters of the Grand Line and beyond, this is one captain who'll never drop anchor until he's claimed the greatest treasure on Earth: the Legendary One Piece!
one-piece.genreDisplay: Animation · Action · Adventure · Comedy · Drama · Fantasy

one-punch-man.title: One Punch Man
one-punch-man.description: "One Punch Man" is a Japanese anime series based on the webcomic created by ONE and its subsequent manga adaptation illustrated by Yusuke Murata. The story follows Saitama, an ordinary man who becomes a superhero for fun. He has trained so rigorously that he can defeat any opponent with a single punch, leading to an existential crisis as he grows bored of his overwhelming strength and the lack of challenging opponents.

solo-leveling.title: Solo Leveling
solo-leveling.description: Ten years ago, the Magic becomes real and the monsters appear. People with magic powers are called hunters and they hunt monsters to protect humanity. Jinwoo Sung is a weak hunter but after a brutal dungeon incident, he gains the ability to level up.

spirited-away.title: Spirited Away
spirited-away.description: Spirited Away is a Japanese animated film that follows Chihiro Ogino, a 10-year-old girl who stumbles into a mysterious spirit world after her parents are transformed into pigs by a witch, Yubaba. To survive and rescue her parents, Chihiro takes a job at Yubaba's bathhouse, a place where spirits come to rejuvenate. With the help of a boy named Haku and other quirky inhabitants, she navigates this strange realm, uncovering her own courage and resourcefulness while unraveling the secrets of her connection to Haku and the spirit world. The story is a blend of magical realism, coming-of-age themes, and Japanese folklore.

weathering-with-you.title: Weathering With You
weathering-with-you.description: Weathering with You follows Hodaka Morishima, a teenage runaway who arrives in a rain-soaked Tokyo seeking a fresh start. Struggling to survive, he lands a job at an occult magazine and meets Hina Amano, a girl with the mysterious ability to stop rain and bring sunshine. As Hodaka and Hina grow closer, they start a business offering "sunshine" to those in need, but Hina’s power comes at a dangerous cost tied to her connection to the weather. Set against a backdrop of relentless storms, the story weaves a tender romance with themes of sacrifice, love, and humanity’s relationship with nature, culminating in a bold choice that reshapes their world.

wind-breaker.title: Wind Breaker
wind-breaker.description: Wind Breaker follows Haruka Sakura, a first-year student at Furin High School, a place infamous for its delinquent students who use their fighting skills to protect their town. Unlike his peers, Sakura has no interest in heroism or teamwork—he's obsessed with battling the strongest fighters to prove himself and reach the top. As he navigates life at Furin, he encounters Bofurin, a group of students dedicated to safeguarding the community, and reluctantly forms bonds with them. The story blends intense street fights with moments of humor and character growth, exploring Sakura's journey from a lone wolf to someone who begins to understand the value of connection, all while facing rival gangs like Shishitoren.

your-lie-in-april.title: Your Lie in April
your-lie-in-april.description: "Your Lie in April" is a Japanese anime series based on the manga of the same name by Naoshi Arakawa. The story follows Kousei Arima, a piano prodigy who loses his ability to hear the sound of the piano after his abusive mother, who was also his instructor, passes away. This traumatic experience leads Kousei to abandon playing the piano, leaving him trapped in a monotonous and colorless life.

your-name.title: Your Name
your-name.description: Your Name tells the story of Mitsuha Miyamizu, a high school girl in a rural Japanese town, and Taki Tachibana, a high school boy in Tokyo, who inexplicably begin swapping bodies in their dreams. As they navigate each other’s lives—leaving notes and rules to cope—they form a unique bond despite never meeting. Their connection deepens when they uncover a cosmic mystery linked to a comet approaching Earth and a tragic event tied to Mitsuha’s town. Racing against time, Taki and Mitsuha strive to find each other and prevent disaster, blending romance, time-bending twists, and themes of fate and memory in a visually breathtaking tale.

my-hero-academia-s4.title: My Hero Academia: Season 2
my-hero-academia-s4.description: A superhero-loving boy without any powers is determined to enroll in a prestigious hero academy and learn what it really means to be a hero.

chainsaw-man.title: Chainsaw Man
chainsaw-man.description: Denji is a teenage boy living with a Chainsaw Devil named Pochita. Due to the debt his father left behind, he has been living a rock-bottom life while repaying his debt by harvesting devil corpses with Pochita. One day, Denji is betrayed and killed. As his consciousness fades, he makes a contract with Pochita and gets revived as Chainsaw Man — a man with a devil's heart.

spy-x-family.title: Spy x Family
spy-x-family.description: A spy known as Twilight is tasked with building a family to execute a mission, not realizing that the girl he adopts as his daughter is a telepath, and the woman he agrees to be in a fake marriage with is a skilled assassin.

vinland-saga.title: Vinland Saga
vinland-saga.description: Young Thorfinn grew up hearing tales of old sailors who had traveled the ocean and reached the place of legend, Vinland. Now he finds himself in the middle of a war between England and the Danes, seeking revenge against the man who murdered his father.

mob-psycho-100.title: Mob Psycho 100
mob-psycho-100.description: Shigeo Kageyama, a.k.a. Mob, is a boy who has trouble expressing himself, but who happens to be a powerful esper. He goes about his daily life trying to live peacefully but things get complicated when he is surrounded by evil spirits, shady organizations and his powerful psychic mentor.

tokyo-revengers.title: Tokyo Revengers
tokyo-revengers.description: Takemichi Hanagaki learns that his ex-girlfriend was killed by the Tokyo Manji Gang. Traveling through time, he decides to infiltrate the gang and rise through the ranks to change the future and save her life.

dragon-ball-super-super-hero.title: Dragon Ball Super: Super Hero
dragon-ball-super-super-hero.description: The Red Ribbon Army was once destroyed by Son Goku. Individuals who carry on its spirit have created the ultimate androids, Gamma 1 and Gamma 2. These two androids are referred to as superheroes, and they start attacking Piccolo and Gohan.

suzume.title: Suzume
suzume.description: A 17-year-old girl named Suzume helps a mysterious young man close doors that are releasing disasters all over Japan. On her journey, she discovers the secrets of the doors and must find the strength to protect the world.

blue-lock.title: Blue Lock
blue-lock.description: After a disastrous defeat at the 2018 World Cup, Japan's team struggles to regroup. But what's missing? An absolute Ace Striker. The Japan Football Union is hell-bent on creating a striker who hungers for goals and thirsts for victory, and does so through Blue Lock — a special training program.

steins-gate.title: Steins;Gate
steins-gate.description: Rintaro Okabe, a self-proclaimed mad scientist, and his lab members accidentally discover a method of time travel through which they can send text messages to the past using a modified microwave. Their experiments attract the attention of a powerful organization, and they find themselves in a race against time.

cowboy-bebop.title: Cowboy Bebop
cowboy-bebop.description: The futuristic misadventures and tragedies of an pointedly cool, easy going bounty hunter and his partners aboard the spaceship Bebop. A ragtag crew of bounty hunters chases down the galaxy's most dangerous criminals in a genre-bending journey through space.

neon-genesis-evangelion.title: Neon Genesis Evangelion
neon-genesis-evangelion.description: In the year 2015, the Angels — monstrous entities of unknown origin — begin their assault on humanity. Ikari Shinji, an ordinary boy, is summoned by his estranged father to pilot Evangelion Unit 01, a giant bio-machine created to fight the Angels.

hunter-x-hunter.title: Hunter x Hunter
hunter-x-hunter.description: Gon Freecss aspires to become a Hunter, an exceptional being capable of greatness. With his friends and his potential, he seeks for his father who left him when he was younger. Along the way, he faces incredible challenges and powerful enemies.

code-geass.title: Code Geass: Lelouch of the Rebellion
code-geass.description: The Empire of Britannia has invaded Japan using giant robot weapons called Knightmare Frames. Japan is now referred to as Area 11, and its people are called Elevens. Lelouch, an exiled Britannian prince, obtains the power of Geass and leads a rebellion to destroy the empire.

mashle-magic-and-muscles.title: Mashle: Magic and Muscles
mashle-magic-and-muscles.description: In a world where magic is everything, Mash Burnedead has a secret — he has no magic. Living secretly in the forest with his father, Mash's peaceful life is threatened when he is discovered. To protect his quiet life, he enrolls in the prestigious magic school where academic excellence is the key to survival.

oshi-no-ko.title: Oshi no Ko
oshi-no-ko.description: When a young country doctor obsessed with a rising pop idol dies, he is reborn as one of her twin children. Now named Aqua, he must navigate the dark world of the Japanese entertainment industry from the inside while uncovering the mystery behind his mother's past.

frieren-beyond-journeys-end.title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End
frieren-beyond-journeys-end.description: After the defeat of the Demon King, the members of the hero's party go their separate ways. Frieren, the elven mage, begins a new journey to understand humanity and the meaning of the connections she made, reflecting on her thousand-year lifespan.

hell-s-paradise.title: Hell's Paradise
hell-s-paradise.description: Gabimaru the Hollow, a shinobi formerly known as the strongest in his village, is sentenced to death. He is given one chance at freedom: travel to a mysterious island said to be the home of immortality, and bring back the elixir of life for the Shogun.

bocchi-the-rock.title: Bocchi the Rock!
bocchi-the-rock.description: Hitori Gotoh is a lonely high school girl whose heart lies in her guitar. She dreams of being in a band someday, but her social anxiety holds her back. That is, until she is dragged into the spotlight by Nijika Ijichi, the energetic drummer of her band, Kessoku Band.

the-apothecary-diaries.title: The Apothecary Diaries
the-apothecary-diaries.description: Maomao, an apothecary's daughter, was kidnapped and sold to the Imperial Palace as a servant. Using her knowledge of medicine and herbs, she begins solving mysterious incidents within the inner court, catching the attention of a handsome eunuch court official.

dandadan.title: Dandadan
dandadan.description: Momo Ayase and Okarun have completely different beliefs: one believes in ghosts while the other believes in aliens. When they try to prove each other wrong, they end up discovering that both are real and must team up to face supernatural threats.

bleach-thousand-year-blood-war.title: Bleach: Thousand-Year Blood War
bleach-thousand-year-blood-war.description: The peace in Soul Society is shattered when the Wandenreich, a hidden Quincy empire, declares war. Ichigo Kurosaki must once again take up his Zanpakuto to defend the Soul Society in this epic final arc of the Bleach saga.

made-in-abyss.title: Made in Abyss
made-in-abyss.description: The Abyss — a gaping chasm stretching down into the depths of the earth, filled with mysterious creatures and relics from a time long past. An orphan named Riko lives on the edge of the Abyss and dreams of following in her mother's footsteps as a Cave Raider.

cyberpunk-edgerunners.title: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners
cyberpunk-edgerunners.description: In a dystopia riddled with corruption and cybernetic implants, a talented but reckless street kid strives to become an edgerunner — a mercenary outlaw also known as a cyberpunk. Based on the world of Cyberpunk 2077.

tokyo-ghoul.title: Tokyo Ghoul
tokyo-ghoul.description: A Tokyo college student is attacked by a ghoul, a superpowered human who feeds on human flesh. He survives, but has become half ghoul and must find a way to integrate into both societies while dealing with his new hunger.

sword-art-online.title: Sword Art Online
sword-art-online.description: In the year 2022, thousands of people become trapped inside a virtual reality MMORPG called Sword Art Online. If they die in the game, they die in real life. Kirito, a solo player, must fight his way through all 100 floors to free everyone.

dragon-ball-daima.title: Dragon Ball DAIMA
dragon-ball-daima.description: A mysterious conspiracy sends Goku and his friends into a brand new adventure. When a wish turns Goku and the others into children, they must journey through the Demon Realm to undo the wish and uncover the truth behind the sinister plot.

re-zero.title: Re:ZERO -Starting Life in Another World-
re-zero.description: Subaru Natsuki is suddenly summoned to a fantasy world. With no knowledge, money, or special abilities, the one thing he gets is the mysterious power of Return by Death — every time he dies, he comes back to a specific point in time.

fire-force.title: Fire Force
fire-force.description: Spontaneous Human Combustion — a chaotic phenomenon that turns people into living infernals. The Special Fire Force is formed to combat these cases. Shinra Kusakabe, who has the ability to ignite his feet at will, joins the force to find the truth behind the fire that killed his family.
